StackName.description: The name associated with the stack.

ChangeSetId.description: The unique ID of the change set.

Description.description: A user-defined description associated with the stack.

CreationTime.description: The time the stack was created.

DeletionTime.description: The time the stack was deleted.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The time the stack was last updated.

StackStatusReason.description: Explanation for the current stack status.

DisableRollback.description: Whether rollback on stack creation failures is disabled.

NotificationARNs.description: Amazon SNS topic ARNs for stack event notifications.

TimeoutInMinutes.description: Time allowed for stack creation before failure.

Capabilities.description: The capabilities allowed in the stack.

RoleARN.description: The IAM role ARN used by CloudFormation.

ParentId.description: For nested stacks, the stack ID of the direct parent.

RootId.description: For nested stacks, the stack ID of the top-level stack.
